1.content: Test @ai fix command to verify Data Quality Scanner works
1.details:
1. Verify scanner can detect issues on a test Sales Order
2. Verify @ai !fix applies fixes correctly
3. Confirm fixes are applied and scanner shows clean results

2.details:
1. Check PaymentAgent creates Payment Entries from Sales Invoices
2. Verify multi-currency support works (USD → MXN)
3. Confirm exchange gain/loss calculation

3.details:
1. Confirm all 8 steps work together
2. Check workflow orchestrator status
3. Document any gaps in integration

4.details:
1. Create summary of what's completed
2. Identify remaining work
3. Update project status
